parameters-en.Frequency: Controls the frequency of the FM (Frequency Modulation).
parameters-en.AM Freq: Controls the frequency of the AM (Amplitude Modulation).
parameters-en.LFO: When on, enables the LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator) to modulate the FM and AM frequencies up and down.
parameters-en.LFO Rate: Controls the rate or speed of the LFO. When LFO Rate is set to note values, it follows the system tempo. Does nothing if LFO is off.
parameters-en.LFO Shape: Controls the wave shape of the LFO. Does nothing if LFO is off.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the ring modulation effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no effect is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
